entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 11 AM CDT TUESDAY
entry.data: EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT FROM 11 AM TO 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE AROUND 90
CALM WINDS
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS AROUND 80

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
